heading: Definitions
label: 5340 Definitions

children.heading: .—Department of the treasury law enforcement organizations
children.label: 1 .—Department of the treasury law enforcement organizations
children.text: The term “Department of the Treasury law enforcement organizations” has the meaning given to such term in section 9705(n).

children.label: A
children.text: means the movement of illicit cash or cash equivalent proceeds into, out of, or through the United States, or into, out of, or through United States financial institutions, as defined in , United States Code; orsection 5312 of title 31

children.label: B
children.text: has the meaning given that term (or the term used for an equivalent offense) under State and local criminal statutes pertaining to the movement of illicit cash or cash equivalent proceeds.

children.heading: .—Secretary
children.label: 3 .—Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Treasury.

children.heading: .—Attorney general
children.label: 4 .—Attorney general
children.text: The term “Attorney General” means the Attorney General of the United States.
